articles.title: Magyar calls out former leading Fidesz politicians by name in opening remarks in Parliament
articles.description: The Hungarian PM said that his government's task right now is to make politics a service once again, rather than a tool for oppressing the nation and stressed that they are all there to serve every single Hungarian, regardless of who they voted for.

A Fidesz érdemi kormányzást kért, a KDNP Orbán Viktor védte, a Mi Hazánk pedig a Facebookot és az RTL-t támadta válaszul.
